arcana.name: Arcana

findings: team buffs (180% AD / 180% casterATK) are DEAD without a B3 Electric caster present + her Wheel-of-Fortune status; grade only in mono-Electric comp

arcana.evidence: Pure model — audit/review language only, not fight-validated

skill1: The Magician: Cooldown of Skill 2 ▼ 75% for 15 sec.

caveats: skill1: the 180% Attack Damage grant targets Burst 3 Electric allies who cast their Burst Skill this rotation — inert in teams without one (⚑ unmeasured team-conditional)
skill2: the 180% caster-ATK 'Strength' grant has the same Burst-3-Electric-caster condition — inert in teams without one (⚑)
skill1/skill2: Wheel of Fortune gate approximated as every-2nd-Full-Burst-end (assumes she bursts every other rotation at her 40s cooldown) — unverified against a recording (⚑)
cadence: RL fire cadence / reloadFrames 171 / 60-frame charge are unmeasured datamine values; bolt-recovery gap shipped ON, autofire unverified (⚑)
